notes: AD95 — 95% aluminum oxide armor ceramic by CoorsTek. Higher purity and ballistic performance than AD90. RHAe ~2.3-2.5 per mm vs KE per manufacturer data. Used in Leopard 2A6 turret composite arrays. Better multi-hit than higher-purity AD995 due to optimized grain structure.

source.methodology: RHAe from CoorsTek published ballistic test data for AD95 vs AP threats. Density and purity per manufacturer specification.
